reviews.comment:
Pedí un mapa en el full y me dijeron que no tenían,  luego pregunté al playero y me dijo que sí tenían.

(Translated by Google)
I asked for a map at the mall and they told me they didn't have one, then I asked the beach attendant and he told me they did have one.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHcFBMbldBEAE

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio, muy buena atención, los empleados de la oficina del ACA realmente deja mucho que desear, no  informan bien y recomiendan hoteles que no son de ellos, muy mala atención

(Translated by Google)
The service at the gas station was very good, but the employees at the ACA office really leave much to be desired. They don't provide good information and recommend hotels that aren't theirs; very poor service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHNE51TXJ3RRAB
